    XmlWriter
    XmlWriter.cdata(String value)
    Emits a CDATA section <![CDATA[ ... ]]>, used for embedded CSS and scripts.
    XmlWriter
    XmlWriter.comment(String value)
    Emits an XML comment <!--...--> with no decorative spacing, matching the legacy serializer.
    XmlWriter

    Emits a processing instruction <?target data?>, e.g.
    XmlWriter
    XmlWriter.raw(String markup)
    Emits already-serialized markup verbatim, with no escaping and no indentation.
